title: Keep it going 🤣👇 The internet wants more CEO taste tests after McDonald’s CEO Chris Kempczinski went viral for taking the world’s smallest bite of a Big Arch burger. His awkward video showing him referring to the burger as a “product” and barely making a dent sparked a wave of response videos from Burger King, Wendy’s, A&W, and KFC executives all eating their own burgers on camera. Suddenly executives from multiple chains were posting taste tests like it was a competitive sport. Now the internet’s demanding more CEO challenges. People online are asking for the CEO of Planet Fitness to try canceling his own gym membership, the CEO of Comcast to navigate their customer service phone tree, and the CEO of Spirit Airlines to fly economy. The trend taps into frustration with companies that create products or services their own leadership wouldn’t actually use.
